agentExperts.chat.defaultPrompt: Act as {{title}} and help me plan the first step.
agentExperts.empty: No matching experts. Clear filters or try another keyword.
agentExperts.subtitle: Discover reusable professional Agents. Each expert binds a clear persona, skills, memory template, and workflow, then launches through the current Agent Runtime chain.
agentExperts.title: Expert Plaza
agentExperts.info.title: Expert Info
agentExperts.info.profileSwitch.label: Current expert
agentExperts.info.profileSwitch.ariaLabe: Switch the expert for the current chat
agentExperts.info.overview.empty: This expert binds persona, skills, memory, and workflow context to the current Agent chat.
agentExperts.info.overview.workWithConte: Understand the current project goal first, then provide actionable advice.
agentExperts.info.overview.workWithRefs: Use bound skills, memory templates, and workflows when they are relevant.
agentExperts.info.boundary.truth: Work from real context and user-provided information without inventing missing facts.
agentExperts.info.boundary.private: Project files, private memory, and chat content are not written back to the public expert catalog.
agentExperts.info.boundary.soul: Global Soul only affects communication rhythm. Expert persona is not written back to Global Soul and does not enter formal artifacts by default.
agentExperts.info.memory.title: MEMORY.md — {{title}} Memory
agentExperts.info.memory.defaultFocus: Continuously collect preferences, constraints, and review signals for this task.
agentExperts.info.memory.templateEnabled: The expert memory template is enabled as long-term context for this chat.
agentExperts.info.memory.disabled: This expert has no memory template enabled.
agentExperts.info.skills.addAria: Add a skill to the current Agent
agentExperts.info.skills.dialogTitle: Add a skill to the current Agent
agentExperts.info.skills.dialogSubtitle: Selected skills are added to this expert chat skillRefs and included in the next Agent runtime request context.
agentExperts.info.skills.mapDialogSubtit: Choose an installed or catalog-resolvable skill to replace the unmapped reference. The next request will use the same on-demand loading path.
agentExperts.info.skills.replaceDialogSu: The selected skill replaces the current unavailable reference and is used for readiness in the next expert request.
agentExperts.info.skills.searchPlacehold: Search skill name, description, or ref
agentExperts.info.skills.runtime.readyDe: All bound skills can enter the on-demand loading path. The next request searches first, then reads only the matched instructions.
agentExperts.info.skills.runtime.partial: Runnable skills still apply. The rest need mapping or registration before they can use the same on-demand path.
agentExperts.info.skills.runtime.blocked: Current bindings have no readable local instructions or catalog mapping yet. Complete that before trying them.
agentExperts.info.skills.runtime.emptyDe: Add a skill, and this expert will search on the next request and load only the matched instructions.
agentExperts.info.skills.editNotice: Updated: the next message will use the current skill settings.
agentExperts.info.skills.enableNotice: Selected {{count}} workspace skills for runtime enablement; the next message will add them to this turn's runtime allowlist.
agentExperts.info.skills.registrationDra: Create a registerable workspace Skill for expert skill "{{title}}". Original ref: {{ref}}.
Use this when the expert needs the "{{title}}" capability.
Add the project context, input shape, and constraints this skill should read.
Return output the current expert can continue executing directly.
Confirm the task goal, read the required context, then deliver according to the skill instructions.
If information or permission is missing, explain the gap and ask for the missing input.
agentExperts.info.skills.trace.bodyRead: Recently read skill instructions on demand
agentExperts.info.skills.evidence.title: Evidence pack recap
